error.boundary.title: Something went wrong.
error.boundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. You can try resetting the view or reloading the page.
error.db.quotaExceeded: Browser storage is full. Please delete old projects or snapshots.
error.db.invalidState: Internal database error. Please reload the page.
error.db.unknown: Unknown error while accessing the database.
error.ollama.unreachableHint: Ollama not reachable ({{url}}). Make sure Ollama is running: ollama serve
error.mic.denied: Microphone access denied. Please grant permission in your browser settings.
error.mic.noSpeech: No speech detected. Please try again.
error.mic.noDevice: No microphone found. Please connect a microphone.
error.mic.unsupported: Language not supported by the browser.
vc.title: Version History
vc.noSnapshotsHint: Create a snapshot to save the current state.
vc.createSnapshotDescription: Saves the current state of the manuscript as a restorable snapshot.
vc.restoreDescription: The manuscript will be reset to the snapshot
vc.restoreWarning: The current state will be lost unless a snapshot exists. Create one beforehand!
vc.compareHint: Side-by-side text; red/green marks line-level changes.
vc.compareWordHint: Changed lines also show word-level highlights.
vc.compareTruncated: Showing first {{shown}} of {{total}} lines (limits load on slower devices).
collab.title: Collaboration
collab.p2pDescription: Share the Room ID with your co-authors. Everyone in the same room sees changes live — without a server.
collab.passwordHint: All participants must enter the same password to join the room.
collab.technicalDescription: Collaboration uses Yjs + WebRTC for P2P synchronization. Data is transferred directly between browsers — no server stores your content.
apiKey.invalidKey: Invalid API key. Please enter a valid key.
apiKey.rateLimited: Rate limit reached. Please wait and try again. (API key is valid)
apiKey.noInternet: No internet connection. Please check your connection.
apiKey.decryptFailed: API key could not be decrypted
apiKey.decryptFailedDetail: The saved API key could not be decrypted (e.g. after browser change or deleted data). Please re-enter your API key.
pwa.offlineNote: Writing, Saving & Snapshots continue to work.
pwa.offlineWorksContinue: Writing, Saving & Snapshots continue to work.
pwa.installHint: Available offline · Direct access from homescreen
pwa.installDescription: Available offline · Direct access from homescreen
pwa.updateDescription: A new version of StoryCraft Studio is ready.
pwa.shareReceivedHint: Stored for this session — you can paste it in Writer when you're ready.
templates.offlineNotice: You are offline — showing embedded example templates. For the complete community offering, connect to the internet.
templates.offlineFallback: You are offline — showing embedded example templates. For the complete community offering, connect to the internet.
collab.securityWarningDetail: Connections use a public relay by default. Room content is P2P encrypted, but connection metadata (room IDs) passes through the relay. For sensitive projects, consider self-hosting.

comments.title: Comments
revisions.title: Revision History
tour.intro.title: Welcome aboard
tour.intro.body: A short tour of StoryCraft Studio: navigation, command palette, and settings.
tour.navigationOnly.introBody: Let’s focus on how you move around the app on desktop and mobile.
tour.navigationOnly.outroBody: You can replay navigation-only tours anytime from Help.
tour.nav.title: Move around the app
tour.nav.body: Use the sidebar on desktop or the bottom bar on your phone to open Dashboard, Manuscript, Characters, Export, and more.
tour.palette.title: Command palette
tour.palette.body: Press Ctrl+K (⌘K on Mac) to search commands, switch theme or language, and jump to any view.
tour.settings.title: Settings
tour.settings.body: Configure API keys, AI provider (Gemini cloud or local Ollama), appearance, editor, backups, and exports.
tour.outro.title: You're set
tour.outro.body: Your work saves automatically on this device. Open Help anytime to run this tour again.
tour.outro.helpCta: Tip: open Help from the sidebar for articles, FAQs, and the AI guide — then use “Try it now” to jump straight into a view.
portal.welcome.title: Welcome to StoryCraft Studio
portal.welcome.subtitle: Your AI-powered creative partner for writing.
portal.welcome.demoHint: New here? Load a short sample story with outline and manuscript to explore the app.
portal.new.demo.title: Explore the demo project
portal.new.demo.description: Pre-filled project with outline and first chapter — ideal for learning the UI and tools.
portal.demo.title: Demo: The Sealed Tower
portal.demo.logline: A short sample to try outline, manuscript, and the workspace.
portal.demo.outline1Desc: The river town; the protagonist discovers a forbidden tower.
portal.demo.outline2Desc: The seal breaks; a decision with consequences.
portal.demo.chapterContent:
Morning fog clung to the quays as Lyra unrolled the old city map. A faint circle marked the northwest corner — the tower no one mentioned.

She tucked the paper away and followed the narrow path until the iron lattice rose before her. The padlock was warm in the sun; the metal still cold.
portal.new.title: How would you like to begin?
portal.new.description: Choose a starting point that best suits your creative process.
portal.new.template.title: Start with a Template
portal.new.template.description: Use a classic narrative structure like the Three-Act Structure to guide your story.
portal.new.ai.title: Generate with AI
portal.new.ai.description: Provide a simple idea and let our AI build a detailed plot outline for you.
portal.new.blank.title: Start with a Blank Manuscript
portal.new.blank.description: For those who know where they're going. Begin with an empty first chapter.
portal.open.title: Open an Existing Project
portal.open.description: Load a previously saved project from a backup file (.json) to continue your work.
initialProject.title: My Untitled Story
initialProject.logline: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step...
dashboard.noLogline: No logline yet. Add one in the manuscript inspector!

dashboard.glance.title: At a Glance
dashboard.stats.title: Project Stats
dashboard.healthScore.title: Project health
dashboard.healthScore.body: A lightweight blend of goal progress, cast depth, and worldbuilding coverage.
dashboard.quickAccess.title: Quick Actions
dashboard.quickAccess.manuscriptDesc: Jump into the manuscript editor to write and organize.
dashboard.quickAccess.writerDesc: Use the AI Writing Studio to overcome writer's block.
dashboard.quickAccess.outlineDesc: Generate a new plot structure with the AI outliner.
dashboard.quickAccess.charactersDesc: Manage your cast of characters in the dossiers.
dashboard.quickAccess.worldDesc: Build and explore the worlds of your story.
dashboard.quickAccess.exportDesc: Format and download your completed project.
dashboard.details.title: Story Details
dashboard.details.loglinePlaceholder: A one-sentence summary of your story.
dashboard.loglineModal.title: AI Logline Suggestions
dashboard.onboarding.title: Quick tips
dashboard.onboarding.tip1: Use the sidebar to switch between Manuscript, Characters, Worlds, and Export.
dashboard.onboarding.tip2: Add an API key in Settings to unlock cloud AI, or choose Ollama for local models.
dashboard.onboarding.tip3: Your work saves automatically to this device — snapshots are available under Version Control.
dashboard.authorInsights.title: Author pipeline insights
dashboard.authorInsights.readabilityNeed: Write a bit more — readability needs ~40+ words for a stable score.
dashboard.authorInsights.readabilityFoot: Higher scores usually mean easier reading; tune for your genre intentionally.
dashboard.authorInsights.timelineClear: No timeline warnings from scene metadata.
dashboard.authorInsights.timelineWarnBad: {{count}} warnings — refine scene dates/durations on the Scene Board.

manuscript.inspector.aiWorkingStatus: Artificial intelligence is working on your request.
manuscript.select: Select a section from the navigator to begin writing.
manuscript.visualize.title: Scene illustration
manuscript.visualize.hint: Gemini (or your configured image-capable provider) generates one illustration from this section. Stored locally per section.
manuscript.visualize.successBody: Preview below; full image saved in local storage.
manuscript.binder.empty: No research items yet. Add a folder or note.
manuscript.binder.assetsLocalHint: Files stay on this device (IndexedDB or Tauri project folder). Full project ZIP export can bundle these in a later release.

writer.studio.title: AI Writing Studio
writer.studio.description: Your AI co-author. Generate, improve, and brainstorm with full project context.
writer.studio.context.title: Manuscript Context
writer.studio.context.contentPlaceholder: Select or create a manuscript section to begin.
writer.studio.tools.title: AI Tools
writer.studio.tools.continue.title: Continue Writing
writer.studio.tools.continue.instruction: Place your cursor in the manuscript where you want the AI to start writing.
writer.studio.tools.improve.title: Improve Text
writer.studio.tools.improve.noSelection: Select text in the manuscript to improve.
writer.studio.tools.changeTone.title: Change Tone
writer.studio.tools.dialogue.title: Generate Dialogue
writer.studio.tools.dialogue.scenarioPla: e.g., Jax confronts the informant about the bad intel.
writer.studio.tools.brainstorm.title: Brainstorm Ideas
writer.studio.tools.brainstorm.contextPl: Provide a brief situation, or the AI will use the current manuscript section.
writer.studio.tools.synopsis.title: Summarize Section
writer.studio.tools.synopsis.instruction: The AI will generate a summary of the currently selected manuscript section.
writer.studio.tools.grammarCheck.title: Grammar & Style
writer.studio.tools.grammarCheck.instruc: Select text and click 'Grammar & Style' to check and improve errors and style (auto-detects English/German).
writer.studio.controls.title: Style Controls
writer.studio.result.title: AI Scratchpad
writer.studio.tools.critic.title: AI Critic
writer.studio.tools.critic.instruction: Act as your professional literary critic and editor.
writer.studio.tools.plotholes.title: Plot-Hole Detector
writer.studio.tools.plotholes.instructio: Find logical gaps or plot holes in the selected text.
writer.studio.tools.consistency.title: Universe Consistency
writer.studio.tools.consistency.instruct: Check the text against your character dossiers and world lore for continuity errors.
writer.chapter.label: Chapter: {{title}}
writer.context.label: Context
writer.tools.label: Tools
writer.versionControl.label: Versions
writer.imagePrompt.description: Generates an optimized DALL·E 3 / Midjourney prompt from the current scene or text selection.
writer.imagePrompt.tip: Tip: Select a specific text section for a focused scene prompt.
writer.imagePrompt.note: The generated prompt works directly in DALL·E 3 and Midjourney.
templates.title: Template Library
templates.description: Choose a proven structure, or generate your own with AI, then remix it to perfection.
templates.modal.title: Preview: {{name}}
templates.modal.ai.title: Personalize with AI
templates.modal.ai.description: Give the AI your core concept, and it will generate personalized prompts for each section to get you started.
templates.modal.ai.placeholder: e.g., A grizzled space detective hunting a phantom thief across colonized planets.
templates.remix.title: Remix Template
templates.remix.description: Drag, edit, add, or delete sections to create your perfect structure.
templates.remix.descriptionHint: This is a preview. To edit, click 'Remix this Template'.
templates.custom.title: Create Your Own Template
templates.custom.description: Let AI build a bespoke structure for your unique story idea.
templates.custom.modalDescription: Describe your story, and our AI will architect a custom-tailored outline for you.
templates.custom.conceptPlaceholder: e.g., A slow-burn political thriller with a focus on betrayal.
templates.custom.elementsPlaceholder: e.g., Needs a mid-point reversal, a false victory, and a tragic ending.
templates.error.personalizationFailed: AI personalization failed. Applying the standard template instead.
templates.error.customGenerationFailed: AI template generation failed. Please try again or refine your prompt.
templates.threeAct.name: Three-Act Structure
templates.threeAct.description: A classic model for narrative fiction that divides a story into three parts: Setup, Confrontation, and Resolution.
templates.threeAct.arc: A foundational structure with a clear beginning, middle, and end. Builds tension steadily towards a single climax.
templates.herosJourney.name: The Hero's Journey
templates.herosJourney.description: A common template that involves a hero who goes on an adventure, wins a victory in a decisive crisis, and comes home changed.
templates.herosJourney.arc: A cyclical journey of transformation, taking a character from their ordinary world into the unknown and back again.
templates.saveTheCat.name: Save the Cat! Beat Sheet
templates.saveTheCat.description: A popular storytelling structure, especially for screenplays, that breaks a story down into 15 key 'beats' or plot points.
templates.saveTheCat.arc: A detailed, beat-by-beat guide for commercial storytelling, focusing on pacing and audience engagement.
templates.fichteanCurve.name: Fichtean Curve
templates.fichteanCurve.description: A structure that begins with rising action, leading through a series of crises to a climax, followed by a falling action.
templates.fichteanCurve.arc: A tension-focused arc that throws the reader directly into the action and maintains suspense through escalating crises.
templates.murderMystery.name: Murder Mystery
templates.murderMystery.description: A plot centered around a murder that a protagonist must solve. Includes clues, red herrings, and suspects.
templates.murderMystery.arc: A puzzle-box narrative that follows an investigation from crime to revelation, layered with misdirection.
templates.spaceOpera.name: Space Opera
templates.spaceOpera.description: A grand, adventurous story set in space, involving conflict, romance, and futuristic technology.
templates.spaceOpera.arc: An epic, galaxy-spanning adventure with high stakes, focusing on rebellion against a powerful foe.
templates.spaceOpera.sections.5: Journey to a Strange New World
templates.spaceOpera.sections.8: A Dogfight in the Asteroid Belt
templates.spaceOpera.sections.11: A New Hope for the Galaxy
templates.dystopian.name: Dystopian Fiction
templates.dystopian.description: A story set in a futuristic, imagined society where there is great suffering or injustice, typically one that is totalitarian or post-apocalyptic.
templates.dystopian.arc: A narrative of awakening and rebellion against a seemingly perfect but oppressive society.
templates.romance.name: Classic Romance
templates.romance.description: A genre template focusing on the development of a romantic relationship between two people.
templates.romance.arc: Follows the emotional journey of two characters as they meet, face conflict, and ultimately come together.
templates.thriller.name: Thriller
templates.fantasy.name: Fantasy
templates.fantasy.description: Magical worlds, quests, and hero's journeys.
templates.horror.name: Horror
templates.historical.name: Historical Fiction
templates.historical.arc: Individual fates in the stream of history.
templates.comingOfAge.name: Coming-of-Age
templates.adventure.name: Adventure
templates.mystery.name: Mystery

outline.description: Describe your story idea and let AI create a structured, editable outline for you.

outline.advanced.title: Advanced Options
outline.advanced.charactersPlaceholder: e.g., Jax, the cynical detective; Unit 734, the missing android
outline.advanced.settingPlaceholder: e.g., Neo-Veridia, a rain-soaked city of neon and chrome

outline.result.placeholder: Your generated outline will appear here.
outline.result.body: Fill out the form on the left and click Generate to see your story structure come to life here.

outline.overwriteConfirm: You already have an outline. Generating a new one will replace it. Are you sure you want to continue?
outline.applyOverwriteConfirm: Your manuscript is not empty. Applying this outline will replace your current manuscript. Are you sure you want to continue?

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Customize your workspace, writing preferences, and AI behavior.
settings.language.title: Language & Region
settings.language.description: Choose the display language for the user interface.
settings.appearance.title: Appearance
settings.appearance.presetHint: Accent and warmth presets stack with your dark/light theme.
settings.editor.title: Editor Preferences
settings.editor.previewText1: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed non risus. Suspendisse lectus tortor, dignissim sit amet, adipiscing nec, ultricies sed, dolor.
settings.editor.previewText2: Cras elementum ultrices diam. Maecenas ligula massa, varius a, semper congue, euismod non, mi. Proin porttitor, orci nec nonummy molestie, enim est eleifend mi, non fermentum diam nisl sit amet erat.
settings.ai.title: AI Configuration
settings.ai.creativityDescription: Higher values produce more unexpected results.
settings.apiKey.title: Gemini API Key
settings.apiKey.securityTip1: Your API key is encrypted and stored locally on your device only
settings.apiKey.securityTip2: Never share your API key with anyone
settings.apiKey.securityTip3: Restrict your key to *.github.io in Google AI Studio
settings.apiKey.saved: API key saved and encrypted successfully
settings.apiKey.errorInvalid: Invalid API key format. Key should start with 'AIza'
settings.apiKey.getKeyHint: Get your free API key from
settings.data.title: Project Data & Backups
settings.data.description: Manage your project data. Your project is saved automatically to this browser.
settings.data.snapshotsDescription: The app automatically creates backups. You can restore a previous version here.
settings.data.noSnapshots: No snapshots available yet. Snapshots will be created automatically as you work.
settings.data.settingsFile.title: Settings file
settings.data.settingsFile.description: Export or import application settings as JSON (appearance, editor, shortcuts). Does not include API keys.
settings.data.importError: Failed to import project. The file may be corrupt or in the wrong format.
settings.data.libraryExport.title: Encrypted library backup
settings.data.libraryExport.description: Download all projects, snapshots, codex, RAG vectors, and binder assets as one password-protected ZIP. API keys are never included.
settings.data.libraryExport.errorBody: Could not build the encrypted archive. Try again or export a single-project JSON.
settings.resetModal.title: Reset Project?
settings.resetModal.description: Are you sure you want to reset the project? All characters, worlds, and manuscript content will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
settings.restoreModal.title: Restore Snapshot?
settings.restoreModal.description: Restoring this snapshot will overwrite your current project. All changes made since {{date}} will be lost. This action cannot be undone.
settings.restoreModal.wordCountInfo: This snapshot has {{snapshotWordCount}} words. Your current project has {{currentWordCount}} words.
settings.deleteModal.title: Delete Snapshot?
settings.deleteModal.description: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this snapshot?
settings.about.title: About StoryCraft Studio
settings.about.description: Your AI-powered creative partner for writing.
settings.health.title: App health snapshot
settings.health.description: Runtime diagnostics only — not a substitute for CI Lighthouse or bundle reports.
settings.health.buildNote: Enable “App health snapshot” under Experimental flags to see this panel.
settings.advancedEditor.title: Advanced Editor Features
settings.advancedAi.title: Advanced AI Settings
settings.advancedAi.localRagDescription: Builds a privacy-preserving bag-of-words vector index in your existing project storage (browser IndexedDB or Tauri app data). Optional retrieval for future local AI features.
settings.featureFlags.title: Experimental Feature Flags
settings.featureFlags.description: Enable new or experimental features for testing and advanced workflows.
settings.featureFlags.enableStoryBibleAd: Story Bible advanced (graph + hints in Codex)
settings.shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
settings.shortcuts.description: Customize shortcuts for frequent actions. Conflicting chords are highlighted in amber.
settings.shortcuts.conflictWarning: These chord combinations are assigned more than once:
settings.accessibility.title: Accessibility Settings
settings.accessibility.hub.intro: Improve contrast, motion, focus, and screen reader cues. All choices stay on your device.
settings.accessibility.hub.preset.motorH: Larger text, stronger focus rings, and comfortable tap targets.
settings.accessibility.hub.preset.lowVis: High contrast, large text, and clear focus indicators.
settings.accessibility.hub.preset.cognit: Less motion and fewer non-essential announcements.
settings.accessibility.hub.preset.screen: Screen reader mode on with detailed live region updates.
settings.accessibility.hub.helpHint: Shortcuts, command palette, and inclusive use.
settings.privacy.title: Privacy & Security
settings.performance.title: Performance Settings
settings.notifications.title: Notification Settings
settings.collaboration.title: Collaboration Settings
settings.collaboration.webrtcSignalingUr: One wss:// or ws:// URL per line. Used for Yjs collaboration discovery. Leave the defaults unless you self-host signaling. The site CSP allows secure WebSocket schemes (wss:/ws:).
settings.integrations.title: Third-Party Integrations
settings.integrations.languageToolPrivac: Send text only to the URL you configure. Remote servers stay blocked while “local-only privacy” is enabled unless you use localhost.
settings.backup.title: Backup & Sync Settings
settings.ai.anthropicHint: Anthropic requires a proxy server or the Tauri desktop app for API calls.
settings.ai.ollamaHint: Make sure ollama serve is running and CORS is enabled.
settings.ai.webllmHint: Runs entirely in your browser via WebGPU (optional packages). Large model downloads on first use; use Ollama on desktop for heavier models.
settings.ai.ollamaTauriBypass: Desktop build: StoryCraft calls Ollama directly — no browser CORS barrier.
settings.ai.ollamaBrowserNote: Ollama is only available in the desktop app. The browser's Content Security Policy blocks direct connections to localhost.
settings.ai.geminiSelected: Google Gemini is selected. Configure the API key in the section
settings.ai.anthropicCorsNote: Anthropic Claude cannot be called directly from the browser. Set up a proxy server or use the Tauri desktop app for Anthropic calls.
settings.ai.providerDescription: Choose which AI provider StoryCraft Studio should use.
settings.ai.openAiCompatHint: Leave empty for official OpenAI. For OpenRouter use https://openrouter.ai/api — confirm models and pricing on the provider site (May 2026).
settings.ai.ollamaModelHint: Quick-select models reported by your server — tap to use.
settings.ai.hybridFallbackHint: If the primary provider fails, StoryCraft tries the listed fallbacks (scene generators, codex tools). Writer streaming uses your primary provider only.
settings.advancedAi.modelRecommendations: Popular local checkpoints (verify names in your runtime):
settings.ai.webllm.modelSelectAriaLabel: Select a WebLLM model for local inference
settings.ai.webllm.fallbackChain: Fallback chain: WebLLM → ONNX WASM → Transformers.js
settings.ai.webllm.tabLeaderNote: Only one browser tab runs local inference at a time.
settings.ai.onnx.wasmNote: ONNX Runtime Web runs models via WebAssembly — no GPU required.
help.title: Help & Learning Center
help.description: Find answers, learn how to master StoryCraft Studio, or ask our AI assistant for help.
help.noResults: No results found for "{{query}}". Try another search.
help.ai.title: AI Help Assistant
help.ai.description: Can't find an answer? Ask our AI assistant a question about any feature.
help.ai.initialMessage: Hello! I'm your AI guide for StoryCraft Studio. How can I help you today? You can ask me anything, or start with one of the suggestions below.
help.article.selectPrompt: Select an article on the left to read it, or ask our AI assistant for help.
help.gettingStarted.tour.title: A Quick Tour of the Interface
help.gettingStarted.tour.content:
Welcome to StoryCraft Studio!

The main navigation is on the left sidebar, giving you access to all core tools:

  • Dashboard: Your project's home base. Track stats, set goals, and see your project at a glance.
  • Manuscript: A focused, three-panel view for writing and organizing your chapters.
  • AI Writing Studio: Your creative partner for generating text, improving prose, and overcoming writer's block.
  • Templates: Jumpstart your story with pre-built narrative structures.
  • Outline Generator: Brainstorm a complete plot from a simple idea using AI.
  • Characters & World Building: Create and manage your story's assets with rich details and AI-generated art.
  • Export: Prepare your finished work for sharing in various formats.
  • Settings: Customize your workspace and manage your project data.
help.gettingStarted.firstProject.title: Starting Your First Project
help.gettingStarted.firstProject.content:
Choose Your Path

The Welcome Portal gives you three powerful ways to begin:

  1. Start with a Template: This is great for structured storytelling. Go to the Templates view, choose a structure like the 'Three-Act Structure,' and use the 'Personalize with AI' feature to get custom prompts for each section based on your story idea.
  2. Generate with AI: If you have a concept but no structure, use the Outline Generator. Just provide your genre and a story idea, and it will create a full, editable plot outline that you can apply to your manuscript.
  3. Start Blank: For those who prefer a completely open canvas, this option creates a new project with an empty first chapter, ready for you to start writing immediately.
help.writing.manuscript.title: The Three-Panel Manuscript Editor
help.writing.manuscript.content:
A Distraction-Free Writing Environment

The Manuscript view is designed for focus and flow. On desktop, it features three resizable panels:

  • Navigator (Left): This panel lists all your chapters or sections. Click to jump between them or drag-and-drop to reorder your story on the fly.
  • Editor (Center): This is your main writing space. It features real-time highlighting for mentions. Use the @ key to tag characters (e.g., @Jax) and the # key to tag worlds (e.g., #Neo-Veridia) for easy reference.
  • Inspector (Right): This panel keeps your project's high-level details, like the Title and Logline, always within reach. You can even use the AI Assistant here to generate logline ideas.

On mobile devices, the Navigator and Inspector are tucked away in drawers to maximize your writing space.
help.writing.templates.title: Working with Templates
help.writing.templates.content:
Building on a Solid Foundation

Templates provide a starting structure for your story. In the Templates view, you can:

  • Preview: Click any template to see its sections.
  • Remix: Before applying, click 'Remix this Template'. This allows you to add, delete, rename, and reorder sections to create a custom structure.
  • Personalize with AI: Enter your core story concept and the AI will generate unique, inspiring prompts for each section to guide your writing.
  • Apply: Once you apply a template, it will replace your current manuscript and outline, giving you a clean slate structured for success.
help.writing.outline.title: Mastering the AI Outline Generator
help.writing.outline.content:
From Idea to Plot in Minutes

This is one of the most powerful tools for starting a story. The process is simple:

  1. Provide Your Idea: Enter a genre and your main concept.
  2. Use Advanced Options: For better results, specify key characters, setting, and desired pacing. You can even ask the AI to include a plot twist.
  3. Edit and Refine: The AI will produce a complete, multi-section outline. This is a fully interactive draft. You can rewrite titles and descriptions, drag sections to reorder them, regenerate individual sections, or add new ones manually.
  4. Apply to Manuscript: When you're happy, click 'Apply Outline to Manuscript'. This will create a new manuscript with each outline section as a chapter, complete with your descriptions as writing prompts.
help.worldbuilding.characters.title: Building Characters
help.worldbuilding.characters.content:
Breathing Life into Your Cast

In the Characters view, you manage your cast of characters. You can:

  • Add Manually: Create a blank character sheet to fill out yourself.
  • Generate with AI: Provide a simple concept (e.g., 'a cynical detective who loves cats'), and the AI will generate a detailed backstory, motivation, personality, flaws, and more.
  • Generate a Portrait: Based on the 'Appearance' field, the AI can generate a unique character portrait. You can then use the 'Refine Portrait' input to make changes (e.g., 'give him a scar over his left eye').
  • Regenerate Fields: Don't like a specific detail? Click the regenerate icon next to any field to have the AI rewrite just that part.
help.worldbuilding.worlds.title: World Building
help.worldbuilding.worlds.content:
Constructing Your Universe

The World Building view is for defining your story's setting. Similar to the character builder, you can:

  • Generate with AI: Create a rich world profile from a core concept (e.g., 'a steampunk city powered by captured lightning').
  • Flesh out Details: Manually define geography, culture, and magic/technology systems.
  • Create Timelines and Locations: Use the dedicated tabs in the world atlas to add historical events to a timeline or define key locations within your world.
  • Generate an Ambiance Image: Let the AI create a beautiful, atmospheric image based on your world's description to set the mood.
help.aiStudio.overview.title: Overview of the AI Writing Studio
help.aiStudio.overview.content:
Your Creative Co-Pilot

The AI Writing Studio is your dedicated space for AI-assisted writing. The workflow is designed for power and flexibility:

  1. Select Context: First, choose the manuscript section you want to work on from the dropdown menu in the 'Manuscript Context' panel.
  2. Choose a Tool: Select one of the powerful AI tools from the top of the 'AI Tools' panel.
  3. Provide Input: Depending on the tool, you might need to select text in the editor, choose characters, or write a prompt.
  4. Generate: Click the 'Generate' button. The output will appear in the 'AI Scratchpad' on the right.
  5. Review and Accept: You can edit the generated text in the scratchpad. Once you're happy, use the 'Insert' or 'Replace' buttons to apply it to your manuscript.
help.aiStudio.tools.title: Understanding the AI Tools
help.aiStudio.tools.content:
The Right Tool for the Job

Each tool in the studio serves a different purpose:

  • Continue Writing: Perfect for writer's block. Place your cursor in the text, and the AI will write what comes next.
  • Improve Text: Highlight a sentence or paragraph, and the AI will rewrite it. Use the Style dropdown to guide the improvement (e.g., make it more 'Cinematic').
  • Change Tone: Similar to 'Improve Text,' but uses the Tone dropdown to change the mood (e.g., make it more 'Suspenseful').
  • Generate Dialogue: Select the characters in the scene, describe the scenario, and the AI will write their conversation.
  • Brainstorm Ideas: Get a list of creative plot points for what could happen next.
  • Summarize Section: Quickly generates a synopsis of the selected manuscript section, which is useful for checking pacing or writing chapter summaries.
help.management.export.title: Exporting Your Work
help.management.export.content:
From Draft to Document

The Export view is a full publishing suite. You have a live preview of your formatted document on the right. In the 'Export Controls' panel, you can:

  • Select Content: Choose which parts of your project to include, such as Character Dossiers or World-Building notes.
  • Choose a Format: We support Markdown (.md), Plain Text (.txt), and PDF (.pdf).
  • Customize PDF: For PDFs, you can set the font, font size, line spacing, and choose whether to include a professional title page.
  • Use AI Enhancements: Check the 'Generate AI Synopsis' box to have the AI write a professional one-page summary of your entire manuscript to be included in the export.
help.management.data.title: Data Management & Backups
help.management.data.content:
Your Data, Your Control

You can manage your project data in Settings > Data & Backups. StoryCraft Studio gives you full control:

  • Export Backup: This saves a complete JSON backup file of your entire project (including all text and settings) to your computer. Use this to move your project to another device.
  • Import Backup: Load a project from a JSON backup file.
  • Reset Project: This will permanently delete all your data in the browser and start a new, blank project.
  • Project Snapshots: This powerful feature is your safety net. The app automatically takes snapshots of your project periodically. You can also create a named snapshot manually before making major changes. You can restore your project to any snapshot at any time.
help.proTips.mentions.title: Using @mentions Effectively
help.proTips.mentions.content:
Create a Living Document

The @mention system in the Manuscript Editor is more than just a visual aid; it's a way to create a deeply interconnected story bible. By consistently tagging characters with @ and worlds with #, you create a visual map of how your story elements interact within the narrative. This makes it easy to see which characters are active in a scene or where your story is set at a glance. It's a simple habit that pays huge dividends during editing and revision.
help.proTips.snapshots.title: Snapshot Strategies for Safe Writing
help.proTips.snapshots.content:
Write Without Fear

The Snapshot system is your best friend during heavy revisions. Here's a pro workflow:

  1. Before starting a major rewrite of a chapter, go to Settings > Data & Backups.
  2. Click 'Create Snapshot' and give it a descriptive name, like 'Pre-Act 2 Rewrite'.
  3. Now, write and revise freely, knowing you can always return to that safe version.
  4. The app also creates automatic snapshots every 30 minutes of activity, so you're always covered. You can restore from any automatic or manual snapshot if you change your mind about a direction your story has taken.
help.faq.saving.title: How is my project data saved?
help.faq.saving.content:
Your entire project, including all text and AI-generated images, is saved automatically and continuously in your web browser's local storage (a database called IndexedDB). This means your work is persisted on your computer between sessions. A 'Saving...' indicator appears in the header when changes are being written, followed by 'All changes saved'.

There is no cloud account or server-side storage. This ensures complete privacy but also means you are responsible for creating backups using the 'Export Backup' feature in Settings.
help.faq.api.title: Do I need an API key?
help.faq.api.content:
Yes. To use any of the AI-powered features (like generation, improvement, or brainstorming), the application requires a Google Gemini API key. You can obtain a free key from Google AI Studio.

Go to Settings → AI Configuration and enter your key. It will be encrypted using AES-256-GCM and stored securely in your browser's IndexedDB. Your key never leaves your device and is never transmitted to any server.
help.faq.privacy.title: Is my story private?
help.faq.privacy.content: Absolutely. Your privacy is paramount. Because all data is stored locally in your browser, we never have access to your work. Your story remains completely private and under your control. When you use AI features, only the specific text needed for that request is sent to the Google Gemini API, and it is not used to train their models.
